module.name: button
module.description: A styled pseudo-button link. The label is the block body (spaces / commas / inline Markdown allowed); the destination is the href parameter. Renders inline.
module.aiSpec:
A styled button-like link for calls to action or navigation. The block body is the button label; the `href` parameter is the link destination. Gotcha: it is declared as a block module but renders INLINE, so it flows within the surrounding text. For a small non-clickable status pill use @badge instead.
Body: the button label (inline markdown allowed).
Parameters: - href (text, default #): link destination. - color (color, default var(--accent-color)): background (solid) or border/text (outline) color. - variant (select: solid | outline, default solid): filled button or an outlined one. - size (select: sm | md | lg, default md): padding and text size. - target (select: _self | _blank, default _self): _blank opens in a new tab (adds rel=noopener). - radius (number px, default blank = theme): corner rounding; blank uses the theme's --radius-sm.
Usage: <!-- @button href: https://example.com, variant: outline, size: lg, target: _blank --> Get Started <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Button
snippet.description: Styled button-like link. Body = the button label.

snippet.label: Button (outline)
snippet.text: <!-- @button href: https://example.com, variant: outline, target: _blank --> Learn more <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Outlined button that opens in a new tab.
